description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black metal pole with a flared, ornate base that provides stability and a touch of classic elegance. At the top, a single lantern-style lamp head is encased in a translucent, slightly yellowed glass housing, capped with a decorative finial. The lamp head is supported by a series of small, ornamental brackets and a collar, adding to its vintage charm. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century street lighting, suitable for urban sidewalks, parks, or historic districts. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, with subtle metallic highlights visible on the pole and base. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are present, and the lamppost stands as a fixed, non-movable structure.
description: A tall, black, vintage-style lamppost with a flared ornate base and a single lantern head encased in yellowed glass, topped with a decorative finial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate base, and clear view of the lantern head with its decorative finial.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender pole and the symmetrical design of the lamp head and base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the lamp head and base details visible, showing no attachments or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the uniformity of the pole and the classic lantern head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style head with a translucent, slightly yellowed glass enclosure and a decorative finial on top.
